title: Vaaren Vaaren Seema Raja Lyrics From Seema Raja Movie
stanzas:
Vaaren Vaaren Seema Raja
vazhiya vidungadaa
naan vesamillaa paasakkaran
nesanthaan nambungadaa (2)

suyanalame podhunalamaa
yethuvene kodiya
en podhunalamum suyanalamthaan
paathuko en padaiya

en pera ketka koodum paaru
arangu arangu.
naan yezhaiketha
aeroplanu othungu othungu (2)

poati potu anbu senju
like-a allum en settai
nokkam pola karuthum solli
vaangi poven paaraatta

vevasaayi illaiyinna
aduppula sorum pongaathudaa
periyorgal sonnaalume
adhaiye naanum solluvendaa

ye oorellaam empadatha
pota aagum trend-u
naan vaalillaa pattaampoochi
ellarukkum naan friendu

edhiriyaave irunthaalum
avana madhikka palaganumdaa
valadhu kaiyu kodukkuradhu
edathu kaikkum theriyanumda

Vaaren Vaaren Seema Raja
vazhiya vidungadaa
naan vesamillaa paasakkaran
nesanthaan nambungadaa

kaala vaara nooru peru
safe-ah nee game aadu.
thookki vidathaan kodi peru
thuninji nee poraadu

panangaasu serthu vachchaa
sugar BP yerumadaa
one by two tea kudichaa
athuthan tasteu kelungadaa

naan veeraappa kattiputtu
thandhathilla dimikki
yaar jalrawayum thattayila
vasippene amukki

degree vaangi kuvichaalum
tamizhe namakku
thani peruma.
aracha maava arachaalum
adhukkum venum
oru therama.

Vaaren Vaaren Seema Raja
vazhiya vidungadaa
naan vesamillaa paasakkaran
nesanthaan nambungadaa (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, emphasizing fun and togetherness.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is likely featured during a festive or celebratory scene in the movie Seema Raja.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Diwakar and Kavitha Gopi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music is composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 26, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaaren Vaaren Seema Raja, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song encapsulates the essence of togetherness, making it perfect for festive occasions. With its upbeat tempo, it encourages listeners to dance and enjoy the moment. The collaboration between Diwakar and Kavitha Gopi adds a unique charm, making this track a highlight of the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaaren Vaaren Seema Raja is an electrifying duet that perfectly captures the festive spirit of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Diwakar and Kavitha Gopi, paired with D Imman's vibrant composition, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the joy and energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, Seema Raja, don't block the way. I'm not pretending; I'm just a loving person, believe me.
Is it my nature or the season? Whatever it is, my nature is to take care of my own.
When you hear my name, look around. I'm like an airplane that doesn't land.
After putting in effort and love, like everything else, I will also express my thoughts and leave.
If there’s no work, don’t disturb the kitchen. Even if the elders say so, I too must speak up.
In every place, if I go, it becomes a trend. I’m not just a butterfly; I’m a friend to everyone.
Even if I’m in trouble, I’ll give my hand to help. I know where to go and how to help.
Come, come, Seema Raja, don't block the way. I'm not pretending; I'm just a loving person, believe me.
When time comes, you’ll play the game safely. Just lift it up and you’ll go without any worries.
If you mix sugar, your blood pressure will rise. Drinking tea one by two will change the taste.
I didn’t just tie up my bravery; I’m living with it. Who can stop me? I’m here to stay.
Even if I get a degree, Tamil is our unique identity. Even if it’s a big deal, it still needs a little clarity.
Come, come, Seema Raja, don't block the way. I'm not pretending; I'm just a loving person, believe me.
